commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the agent read wrapper to retry ENOENT bare daily-memory filenames as `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md` after sandbox validation and adds focused workspace-path regression tests.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +76. Total +131 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live current-main reproduction was established here. Source inspection shows a bare `YYYY-MM-DD.md` read resolves at the workspace root and can ENOENT when the file exists under `memory/`, matching the linked issue trajectory.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review remains because contributor-supplied runtime proof and maintainer fallback-boundary acceptance are required; there is no narrow automated repair to apply.

target.title: fix(agents): normalize bare date filenames to memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md inвҖҰ
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #92372.

Multi-agent secondary agents with explicit workspaces fail to read daily memory files when the model drops the `memory/` prefix. The startup context prelude loads daily memory as `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`, guidance tells the model it's "already included," and the model forms a bare `YYYY-MM-DD.md` path вҖ” hitting ENOENT at the workspace root.

Additionally, the ENOENT retry branch synthesized `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md` and called `params.base.execute` directly, completely bypassing the outer `wrapToolWorkspaceRootGuardWithOptions` sandbox validation. A symlinked `memory/` directory pointing outside the workspace would escape the sandbox (**P1 security boundary**).

## Why This Change Was Made

- Relax `DAILY_MEMORY_PATH_RE` to also match bare date filenames, then prepend `memory/` in `normalizeDailyMemoryReadPath`.
- Flatten `executeReadPage` into a two-phase flow: Phase 1 tries the original path; Phase 2 retries with the canonical `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md` path only on ENOENT.
- Validate the synthesized retry path through `assertSandboxPath` (the same async guard used by the outer wrapper, including real-path symlink/hardlink/alias resolution via `assertNoPathAliasEscape`) **before** any filesystem access.
- Pass the workspace root via an optional `workspaceRoot` string вҖ” no callback indirection. Only injected when `workspaceOnly` is true.
- Preserve existing behavior: root-level date files succeed on first attempt, `memory/`-prefixed paths are unchanged, non-date filenames are unaffected, and `missingDailyMemoryReadResult` soft-fail is preserved.

## User Impact

Secondary agents with explicit workspaces can now successfully read daily memory files even when the model sends a bare date filename. No stale ENOENT errors, no wasted tokens. All synthesized fallback paths remain strictly confined inside the workspace sandbox вҖ” a symlinked `memory/` directory cannot escape.

## Evidence

Base: `origin/main` at `081f8fd1fa`. One squashed commit on `fix/read-tool-bare-date-filename-memory-prefix`.

### е…ЁйҮҸжөӢиҜ•еҘ—д»¶пјҲ7 ж–Үд»¶пјҢ124 жөӢиҜ•пјҢе…ЁйғЁйҖҡиҝҮпјү

```
$ pnpm test src/agents/agent-tools.workspace-paths.test.ts \
         src/agents/agent-tools.read.workspace-root-guard.test.ts \
         src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts \
         src/agents/agent-tools.workspace-only-false.test.ts \
         src/agents/agent-tools.read.host-edit-access.test.ts \
         src/agents/agent-tools.read.arg-value-suffix.test.ts \
         src/agents/agent-tools.read.host-tilde-expansion.test.ts

 Test Files  7 passed (7)
      Tests  124 passed (124)
   Duration  44.39s
```

### з”ҹдә§д»Јз Ғжү§иЎҢиҪЁиҝ№пјҲ`process._rawDebug` жҚ•иҺ·пјҢзңҹе®һж–Үд»¶зі»з»ҹгҖҒзңҹе®һ `createOpenClawCodingTools` е·ҘеҺӮпјү

**еңәжҷҜ 1 вҖ” иЈёж—Ҙжңҹ вҶ’ memory/ йҮҚе®ҡеҗ‘пјҡ**
```
[read-memory] Phase 1 ENOENT path="2026-06-12.md" вҶ’ Phase 2 redirect to "memory/2026-06-12.md"
[read-memory] Phase 2 assertSandboxPath("memory/2026-06-12.md", "/tmp/openclaw-ws-memory-redirect-XXXXXX") ...
[read-memory] Phase 2 assertSandboxPath вҶ’ PASS
[read-memory] Phase 2 OK  redirected to "memory/2026-06-12.md" вҶ’ SUCCESS
```

**еңәжҷҜ 2 вҖ” symlink йҖғйҖёжӢҰжҲӘпјҡ**
```
[read-memory] Phase 1 ENOENT path="2026-06-12.md" вҶ’ Phase 2 redirect to "memory/2026-06-12.md"
[read-memory] Phase 2 assertSandboxPath("memory/2026-06-12.md", "/tmp/openclaw-ws-memory-symlink-escape-XXXXXX/workspace") ...
вҶ’ THROW: Path escapes sandbox root (symlink вҶ’ outside workspace)
вҶ’ ж—  Phase 2 OK вҖ” ж–Үд»¶д»ҺжңӘиў«иҜ»еҸ–
```

**еңәжҷҜ 3 вҖ” ж №зӣ®еҪ•ж–Үд»¶дјҳе…ҲпјҲж— йҮҚе®ҡеҗ‘пјүпјҡ**
```
[read-memory] Phase 1 OK  path="2026-06-12.md" (root-level hit, no redirect)
```

### и·Ҝеҫ„еҪ’дёҖеҢ–

| Input | Output | Status |
|---|---|---|
| `memory/2026-06-12.md` | `memory/2026-06-12.md` | unchanged |
| `2026-06-12.md` | `memory/2026-06-12.md` | corrected |
| `./2026-06-12.md` | `memory/2026-06-12.md` | corrected |
| `regular-file.md` | `undefined` | not triggered |

### е®үе…Ёиҫ№з•Ң

| Scenario | Behavior |
|---|---|
| `memory/` is a regular directory in workspace | `assertSandboxPath` passes, retry proceeds |
| `memory/` is a symlink inside workspace | `assertSandboxPath` passes, retry proceeds |
| `memory/` is a symlink outside workspace | `assertSandboxPath` throws, **no FS access** |
| `workspaceOnly` is false | `workspaceRoot` is `undefined`, no validation |

```
$ pnpm tsgo
# passed clean
```

## Root Cause

`DAILY_MEMORY_PATH_RE` at `agent-tools.read.ts:78` was `/^memory\/\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}\.md$/` вҖ” it only recognized paths with the `memory/` prefix. When the model sent a bare `YYYY-MM-DD.md`, `normalizeDailyMemoryReadPath` returned `undefined`, the path was never corrected, and the read resolved to `workspace-root/YYYY-MM-DD.md` (ENOENT) instead of the correct `workspace-root/memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`.

Security gap: The ENOENT retry called `params.base.execute` directly with the synthesized `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md` path, completely bypassing the outer workspace path guard. No sandbox validation was applied to the fallback path.

## Reviewer Focus

- [`agent-tools.read.ts:78`](src/agents/agent-tools.read.ts#L78) вҖ” relaxed regex
- [`agent-tools.read.ts:257-271`](src/agents/agent-tools.read.ts#L257-L271) вҖ” `normalizeDailyMemoryReadPath` with `memory/` prepend
- [`agent-tools.read.ts:283-342`](src/agents/agent-tools.read.ts#L283-L342) вҖ” flattened `executeReadPage` with Phase 1/Phase 2 + `assertSandboxPath` guard
- [`agent-tools.ts:772`](src/agents/agent-tools.ts#L772) вҖ” `workspaceRoot` injection gated on `workspaceOnly`
- [`agent-tools.workspace-paths.test.ts`](src/agents/agent-tools.workspace-paths.test.ts) вҖ” 3 new regression tests

Files changed: `src/agents/agent-tools.read.ts`, `src/agents/agent-tools.ts`, `src/agents/agent-tools.workspace-paths.test.ts` (+139/-8 lines).
